hooks.rewakeMessage: You just modified a file in a feature folder. Use the rocket-crescendo-feature-claude-md skill to write or update the CLAUDE.md for the affected feature.

hooks.prompt: Run `git diff HEAD --name-only` to check for changed files. If the output is empty, do nothing and stop. If the only changed file is `.claude/settings.json`, do nothing and stop. If there are changed source code files, run the code-reviewer subagent to review them and produce the structured report (Critical Issues, Warnings, Suggestions, Verdict) as defined by the code-reviewer agent.
